data.description: The peer set broadly supports GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, Slack, Jira, Linear, and IDEs	Add a connector/plugin layer for Git platforms and chat/issue systems beyond Jira, starting with GitHub PRs and Slack	High	High	PR-Agent, CodeRabbit, and Greptile all span multiple Git platforms; CodeRabbit also covers Slack/Jira/Linear; rebar’s public docs emphasize Jira, Git, MCP, Gerrit, and GitHub workflows
data.title: broad native support for PR platforms beyond the Git/Gerrit-centric path
